summary: Frontend-only testing of PersonalizedHero, real pet photo display, and breed-specific 'Why for [PetName]' whispers on Shop and Services pages. All core features working correctly. Minor issue: pet photo not displaying because test user's pet (Max) has photo_url: null in database.

issues: Pet photo not showing - displays Soul Score arc instead of real pet photo because pet.photo_url is null in the API response. The code correctly checks for photo_url but the test pet has no photo uploaded.

action_items: For testing real pet photo display, need a test user with pet photo_url populated in database
Alternative: The code fix I applied (checking photo_url first) should work once pet has a photo uploaded
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: PersonalizedHero.jsx now correctly checks for photo_url first: pet?.photo_url || pet?.image_url || pet?.image || pet?.photo || pet?.avatar
ProductCard in ShopPage.jsx correctly implements getBreedWhisper() returning breed-specific messages
ServiceCard in ServicesPage.jsx correctly implements getServiceBreedWhisper() returning breed-specific messages
Both pages show breed whispers in purple-pink gradient boxes for ALL cards
Mobile layout is compact with products/services visible quickly after one scroll
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user Max (Golden Retriever) has photo_url: null in the database. To properly test real pet photo display, need to either upload a photo for this pet or use a different test user with photo.

code_fix_applied.reason: API returns photo_url but original code only checked for image, photo, avatar
